# Karcher Auto Body

> Expert collision repair, auto painting, and cosmetic repair in Nampa, Idaho.

Karcher Auto Body is a family-owned auto body repair shop located at 2302 W. Karcher Rd., Nampa, ID 83651. We have over 50 years of combined experience restoring vehicles to pre-accident condition.

## Contact Information

- Phone: (208) 463-9090
- Address: 2302 W. Karcher Rd., Nampa, ID 83651
- Website: https://karcherautobody.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday 7:30 AM – 5:00 PM (Closed Saturday & Sunday)

## Services

### Collision Repair
Our certified technicians restore vehicles to factory specifications after any collision — large or small. We use OEM-quality parts and the latest tools and techniques.

### Auto Painting
Professional paint services using the latest color-matching technology. We achieve factory-perfect finishes that blend seamlessly, whether your car is a classic or brand-new model.

### Cosmetic Repair
Dents, dings, scratches, and surface blemishes repaired and refinished to showroom condition. No imperfection is too small.

### All Makes & Models
We service domestic and import vehicles of every type — from daily drivers to enthusiast builds and classics.

### Fleet & Dealership Services
Reliable turnaround and competitive rates for fleet management companies and local dealerships.

## Service Area

We proudly serve the Treasure Valley region of Idaho, including:
- Nampa, ID (primary location)
- Caldwell, ID
- Meridian, ID
- Boise, ID
- Kuna, ID

## About Us

Karcher Auto Body is a locally owned, family-oriented business that has been serving Nampa, Caldwell, and surrounding communities for decades. We hold memberships in two Chambers of Commerce. Every vehicle receives the same level of care and precision — our customers are always our top priority.

## Insurance

We work with most major insurance providers and help navigate the claims process to make repairs smooth and stress-free.

## Free Estimates

Estimates are always free. Call (208) 463-9090 or stop by our shop at 2302 W. Karcher Rd. in Nampa during business hours.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How long does a typical collision repair take?**
Minor repairs: 1–3 days. Major collision work: 1–2 weeks. We provide accurate timelines upfront.

**Do you work with insurance companies?**
Yes, we work with most major insurance providers and help navigate claims.

**Can you match my car's original paint color?**
Yes, we use the latest color-mixing and matching technology for factory-perfect finishes.

**Do you offer free estimates?**
Yes — estimates are always free at Karcher Auto Body.
